folio.label: 69v
folio.l: As god helpe me , I laugúe whan that I thynke

note.notetxt: 201There is a cross in the top left margin next to the firt line.ODR

folio.l: How pitously a nygút , I made hem swynke
But be me fey , I tolde of it no store
They had me ©euen , here lond and here tresore
Me neded nat , do lengere diligence
To wynne here loue , or do hem reuerence
They loued me so wel , by god a boue
That I ne told , no deynte of here loue
A wys wo~man , wyl besy hire euäe in oon
To geten hire loue , there as she hatú noon
But syn I had hem , holly in myn hand
And syn that they , had ©eue me al here land

note.notetxt: 213Cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: What shulde I take kepe , hem for to pleese
But if it were for my ¸fyt , and myn eese
I sette hem so a werk , be my fey
That many a nygút , they songen weylawey
The baconö was nat fet , for hem as I trowe
That su~me men han in Essex , at Donmowe
I gouerned hem so wel , after my lawe
That iche of hem , ful blisful was and fawe
To brynge me gay thynges , fro the feyre
They were ful glad , whan I spak to he~ fayre
For god it woot , I chidde hem spitously
Now herkenetú how , I bar me ¸prely
ñe wyse wyues , that can vnderstonde
Thus shuld ©e speke , & bere hem wrongö on honde
For half so boldly , there can noman
Sweren and lyen , as a womman can
I sey nat this , be wyues that ben wyse

note.notetxt: 229There has been a pause in writing after this line. Sameshade of ink, although lighter.ODR

folio.l: But if it be , whan they he~ mys a vyse
A wys wyf shal , if that she can hire good
Bere hi~ an honde , that the kow is wood
And take wytnesse , of hire owen mayde
Of hire assent , but herkenetú how I sayde

note.notetxt: 234Cross in dry point in the left margin. Ink becomes darker tooODR

folio.l: Sire olde kaynard , is this thyn array
Why is my neygúebores wyf , so gay
She is honoured , ouä alle there she gotú
I sitte at hom , I haue no thrifty clotú
What dost thow , at my neyúebores hous
Is she so fair , art thow so amerous
What rovne ©e witú oure mayden , benedicite
Sire olde lechour , late thyne iapes be
xxxx if that I haue , a gosship~ or a freende
xxxú outen gilt , ©e chiden as a fende
